seoTitle: Broughton vs Broughton Village — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Broughton and Broughton Village. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Broughton vs Broughton Village: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Broughton and Broughton Village.
heading: Broughton vs Broughton Village — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Broughton, New South Wales and Broughton Village, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Broughton Village has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Broughton (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Broughton or Broughton Village safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Broughton has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Broughton Village scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Broughton scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Broughton Village scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Broughton or Broughton Village?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Broughton Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
